place_of_offence.address: Room 2110, 21st floor, Hoi Yan House, Hoi Fu Court, No.2 Hoi Ting Road, Tai Kok Tsui, Kowloon
place_of_offence.source: room 2110, 21st floor, Hoi Yan House, Hoi Fu Court, No.2 Hoi Ting Road, Tai Kok Tsui, Kowloon

cross_border.source: No cross-border trafficking or import/export was mentioned in the judgment.

trafficking_mode.source: the Flat ... a rather more active, albeit on a small scale, centre for the distribution, packaging and consumption of different dangerous drugs
paraphernalia of the trafficker were found inside the premises ... multiple re-sealable plastic bags and an electronic scale
E4 could have been sold at street level to drug abusers for HK$9,895.60

roles_facts.source: the judge identified the applicant’s role as a “storekeeper”

reasons_for_offence.source: Mr. Yu informed the court that it was the pain that drove the defendant to resort to dangerous drugs

benefits_received.source: There is no statement that the defendant received any payment, reward, profit, proceeds, benefit, gain or income from drug trafficking for his personal benefit in the judgment.
